Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate this year. But there’s ZERO PATH for that to happen without protecting this must-hold seat in Colorado.
The last time John ran, Republicans spent nearly $50 MILLION trying to beat him. That didn’t faze us. With the support of generous folks like you, we flipped this seat from red to blue and brought home a big win for Democrats and Coloradans.
Because of that win, we’ve been able to deliver real results for Colorado families. We’ve fought to lower prescription drug costs, make housing more affordable, and tackle climate change head-on.
Right now, we are fighting to stop Trump’s corruption, end ICE’s violence, and fix our health care system to bring down health care costs.
This year, we know we can secure another win — _but we need your help._
**_[Will you chip in $5, $25, or more to help us defend Colorado and set Democrats up for a huge upset in the Senate? name: Voter Action Project Electoral College Team
subject: Take away all his tools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Why do we keep talking about the Electoral College? More from Politico:
“ The moves reflect Trump’s intent to undermine programs benefiting Americans in blue-leaning states, while leaders from both parties work to negotiate a government funding agreement. Trump has suggested the shutdown could offer a pretense to cut programs he doesn’t like. "
Protecting our fundamental right to vote, our democracy, and equality means removing every tool that can be abused to harm our fellow citizens.
The reasons to dump the Electoral College continue to grow. Any amount helps -- pitch in with $10, $25, $35, or more to support efforts for a popular vote presidential election >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=042626_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Politico: Trump targets states that voted for Harris in shutdown fight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=042626_3&amount=25]
There's never been a clearer reason to get rid of the Electoral College, friend. We're watching in real time as those in control of the federal government are using it to exact revenge on states that didn't go their way in the last election. Straight from Politico:
“ The White House is targeting Democratic states with its first wave of cuts to federal projects following the government shutdown, impacting billions of dollars in funding for energy and infrastructure ”. Russ Vought, author of Project 2025 and director of the Office of Management and Budget, has gone after billions in federal spending in so-called "blue states" but not publicly announced cuts that affected any state that backed Trump in 2024.
“ We can get rid of a lot of things that we didn’t want, and they’d be Democrat things ,” Trump told reporters ahead of the shutdown. He's not even trying to hide his intent to punish the states that didn't come in for him in the Electoral College.
The Electoral College gives the vote suppressors another tool to target those who disagree with them and harm voters. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $10, $25, $35 or more to help us move towards a popular vote system >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=042626_3&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=042626_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=042626_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=042626_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=042626_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=042626_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=042626_3&amount=35]
We don’t necessarily have to wait for Congress to act, either. Movements like the one in favor of the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) -- an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia -- could end the Electoral College without a constitutional amendment.
With Virginia's recent passage, 17 states plus DC have already joined the NPVIC, accounting for 222 electoral votes and 82% of the electoral votes needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Pennsylvania, Arizona, and other states are also moving a bill through their state legislature to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, it's clear that the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $35 or more today! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=042626_3&amount=35]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042626_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=042626_3&amount=20]

name: Thank Senate Dems (VPP)
subject: They're STOPPING the SAVE Act! >>>
body:
We can’t back down now.
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107774?t=6&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C) Just a few weeks ago, Trump’s dangerous SAVE Act that would disenfranchise MILLIONS was basically a done deal.

**But thanks to Senate Democrats’ relentless fight, we’re inches away from DESTROYING this bill for good — and SAVING voting rights!**

[**We’re calling on EVERY supporter reading this to join the fight and THANK Senate Democrats for defending our democracy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107774?t=7&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C) | [**THANK SENATE DEMOCRATS: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107774?t=8&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C)
---
TO: Senate Democrats
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you! Dear Senate Democrats,

**Thank you for fighting TIRELESSLY against Trump’s disgusting SAVE Act that would disenfranchise married women, target poll workers, and destroy vote-by-mail.**

This is true heroism — and exactly the kind of leadership we need to defeat Republicans’ disgusting attacks on the American people!

It’s clear: Trump wouldn’t be doing this if he wasn’t TERRIFIED. He KNOWS Democrats are on track to end his MAGA trifecta in November.

**He’ll do everything in his power to silence our votes, but with a strong grassroots coalition on our side, I know we can stop him.**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country and to help FLIP the majorities this November! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107774?t=9&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/107774?t=10&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=23850%2E878179%2EDkGe9C)

This one is intense. Adam and I went back live this morning to discuss the shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner. If you're trying to make sense of what actually happened (and what didn't), this is a must-watch.
* [00:01:47] We break down what actually happened at WHCD and why early reactions online immediately went off the rails
* [00:05:20] The viral clips everyone's talking about: Trump stumbling, officials scrambling, and the small details most people completely missed
* [00:09:50] Why the "it was staged" narrative spreads so fast--and how bad-faith actors on both sides exploit chaos for clicks
* [00:16:01] A deeper, uncomfortable truth: how online radicalization, isolation, and broken systems are fueling real-world violence

[00:01:47] We break down what actually happened at WHCD and why early reactions online immediately went off the rails [00:05:20] The viral clips everyone's talking about: Trump stumbling, officials scrambling, and the small details most people completely missed [00:09:50] Why the "it was staged" narrative spreads so fast--and how bad-faith actors on both sides exploit chaos for clicks [00:16:01] A deeper, uncomfortable truth: how online radicalization, isolation, and broken systems are fueling real-world violence [00:24:00] The bigger picture--how media incentives, political extremism, and disinformation are warping reality in real time ** With urgency, --Mike Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

body:
Frustrated, embarrassed, & angry
| | | Thank you for opening this email. I'm writing you today because I wanted to share my story with you. If you have a minute, I'd really appreciate you giving this message a read. Thanks so much in advance! [](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=9155e9ca55174e9b9e792c1784c7f348&_e=pzl2hQfsL_gKXfO5RspR0ZcZnixtuE4JioW82CXuz6CX1Yk9REozOzg-ZEs0CCAIfJEAwbBW3_v_NMKv6RdXqEioOji9CjOSF4Cy49_1rRgDJl-IvoHj-a2owvizEUUC7MGiCpgL5y3F7lBN_PhnG0-VxYKnksHKD0HdNAzl0pECG1Uxz7cGo4PZ_FnBS6kWqqLe6t0cGEjngtNbyWB9f56tDXfUC69Me7Fs8JGZnTgaz3Q29qa3iiFmxyc3WInlK7aIy6P_mdXh2NCfA1Bw5Qa3SZRtZIa3WE6LowX6zOBUd_xzW5W5qUEFitg-mAdMbyq3-BNpbik8CNIppBKe4OH-_l3Fg54GdZbzZtgOs3pnhqgrTaADyYHGjHbyyEJehwvwkIsODIP75OWj6rcoO7ek09POvUafSEG3n39iK6yr_VEOMVuT4q8jQz1NkKqclHyg57BUvtoBhdSKeSwhHsFN0J2mYl20j9qpibubnhYp4AKGImzQzewmLCOs4XWDfB5zTxWX6dfcjdCtwFttzNKPdo5JhzOO1RTBks3bFISsT3nM9x1m0OSJM8lqt-cPvYcufQcmP3x25rMMrmqy6UIuT68HwsCHTaKBxSgWL8u79DwT6197jPZsQ69SRmOivXe3WqRy_2gfGTvwYGXS1udnk9MgrmzqqAlT-jH1J4HfLmk0cwYsfMRFDbek_SsP3shZlWGuMGhqLjPCEooMFI8eBb05Sk3U6K6wnA9bxIBs7mX5bSP6QaORm0eQCbz8lEiLoEhoURGWP33IciMSCQ%3D%3D) I know what it means to fight against the odds. Raised by a single mother on food stamps, I learned the value of hard work and resilience from a young age. I took those lessons with me when I joined the Navy at 18. I built on the grit and determination I was raised with during my 26 years of service. I became a Navy SEAL and defended our country from terrorists and extremists across the globe over 5 combat tours. But my commitment to service didn't end there. In 2020, I took on an entrenched Democrat incumbent and lost, but I refused to give up. I ran again in 2022 and won, becoming a freshman Congressman for Wisconsin's Third District. Against all odds, my Team and I defended this seat from furious and embarrassed Democrats in 2024. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, I don't have the backing of liberal billionaires, celebrities, and Super PACs. I'm just a regular American who loves this country and will always stand up for what's right. This is why I'm coming to you today with a critical request. My Team and I have a MAJOR deadline coming up. While I can't stand asking patriots to part with their hard-earned dollar, I truly need your help to reach this crucial fundraising goal. clean_body: Frustrated, embarrassed, & angry | | | Thank you for opening this email. I'm writing you today because I wanted to share my story with you. If you have a minute, I'd really appreciate you giving this message a read. Thanks so much in advance! I know what it means to fight against the odds. Raised by a single mother on food stamps, I learned the value of hard work and resilience from a young age. I took those lessons with me when I joined the Navy at 18. I built on the grit and determination I was raised with during my 26 years of service. I became a Navy SEAL and defended our country from terrorists and extremists across the globe over 5 combat tours. But my commitment to service didn't end there. In 2020, I took on an entrenched Democrat incumbent and lost, but I refused to give up. I ran again in 2022 and won, becoming a freshman Congressman for Wisconsin's Third District. Against all odds, my Team and I defended this seat from furious and embarrassed Democrats in 2024. Unlike the career politicians in Washington, I don't have the backing of liberal billionaires, celebrities, and Super PACs. I'm just a regular American who loves this country and will always stand up for what's right. This is why I'm coming to you today with a critical request. My Team and I have a MAJOR deadline coming up. While I can't stand asking patriots to part with their hard-earned dollar, I truly need your help to reach this crucial fundraising goal. Listen, the Democrats are frustrated, embarrassed, and angry that we beat them. They've outraised and outspent us at every turn, but we still won because of incredible supporters like you! But the truth is, I don't know that we can hold off their attacks again. They're already building a massive war chest to take me down, and if we don't act now, we'll be playing catch-up when it's too late. Will you stand with me and donate today? Sincerely, Derrick Van Orden | | https:///secure.winred.com/van-orden-for-congress/dvo-june-24-footer/?recurring=true&utmcampaign=20260421NU-YT.118484t1876347-1807&extid=20260421NU-YT.118484t1876347-1807 | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. # [What did last night's attack on the White House Correspondents Dinner reveal?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195575316&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NTc1MzE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyNDkyNDAsImV4cCI6MTc3OTg0MTI0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YGYroyNXpkDivRSHJeDwuMy0WlV6JWK93SdwdoSissQ)
### Double standards among journalists, political figures, and foreign heads of state all indicate a profound bias favoring the president--despite his longstanding role in encouraging political violence.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Apr 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195575316&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NTc1MzE2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzI0OTI0MCwiZXhwIjoxNzc5ODQxMjQwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sKg5oFnkQ4fJapC84GaXmv3FHCr6NmYNIfu9Jiv8bnA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195575316&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NTc1MzE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyNDkyNDAsImV4cCI6MTc3OTg0MTI0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YGYroyNXpkDivRSHJeDwuMy0WlV6JWK93SdwdoSissQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195575316&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NTc1MzE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyNDkyNDAsImV4cCI6MTc3OTg0MTI0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YGYroyNXpkDivRSHJeDwuMy0WlV6JWK93SdwdoSissQ)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/what-did-last-nights-attack-on-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last night, an [attack](https://substack.com/redirect/ffed6072-f4ff-48d2-8afa-271a308e1d78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the White House Correspondents Dinner shocked attendees and observers across the country. California teacher Cole Allen was detained afterward, [suspected](https://substack.com/redirect/2e3b5dd0-45dd-4c20-8f96-c5306073cf2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of evading security measures and shooting a Secret Service agent who survived.
The incident raised concerns about a resurgence of political violence in the U.S., but most of the reporting and analysis about the incident has overlooked the most important aspects to consider.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad89f9d5-3851-4513-abe7-dc6053745325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image captured by Qasim Rashid, Esq.
### **This is America**
Political violence is the antithesis of democracy. It reflects the erosion of debate and reason by force.
It is also quintessentially American. When Presidents Lincoln and Kennedy were murdered in seeming retaliation for their political positions (by an assassin, in one case, and most likely the CIA, in the other), any pretense that our country is supposedly committed to democracy should have been laid bare.
Many defining features of our country--from bought & paid for elections, to gerrymandering, a [corrupt](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar/note/c-249415126) Supreme Court, and the electoral college--stand in stark opposition to democracy. In that context, political violence appears more on brand than an aberration.
There is an entire federal agency dedicated to [political violence](https://substack.com/redirect/b291527f-60d0-46c5-8e93-deddcdf9d72e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): ICE, which Congress just [expanded](https://substack.com/redirect/47b4ddc3-e676-4747-8382-a6d04c1e86f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last year to become the nation's most well-funded armed domestic agency.
And that's just _within_ the U.S.
Our country's role in the world has been defined by political violence for nearly a century. Every assassination of a foreign leader--most recently last month, when the Pentagon murdered the Iranian head of state to [trigger](https://substack.com/redirect/7e65ab13-766d-4337-b461-ea9ad9299261?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Third World War--embodies political violence. Every "intervention" to impose regime change (like the one in [Venezuela](https://substack.com/redirect/484d9475-8685-4f7f-a1c4-68388887bb3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) three months ago, or the CIA coup in Iran 73 years ago that [set the stage](https://substack.com/redirect/8973ea24-2819-4ef2-9060-c6427e6b577e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the past half century of diplomatic tension) represents political violence.
Looking beyond our government, political violence is far more American than apple pie (which was [French](https://substack.com/redirect/7aff9767-5b69-4fb7-9cb9-13e5d458910c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before being appropriated by this country, like so many other things).
Given the litany of voices that have called out seeking sane regulations on firearms, every mass shooting is ultimately an example of political violence. The attack on the [Pulse nightclub](https://substack.com/redirect/9181a142-9c3e-438b-bc40-66370d01dd6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Orlando, FL in 2016 might offer the most overt example, since it directly targeted a marginalized community and remains the second deadliest mass shooting in U.S. history.
But every hate crime reflects the same pattern, whether targeting LGBTQ communities, [Sikhs](https://substack.com/redirect/3b770b0d-5aa9-4548-b528-67e07d209440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (who have endured a 3,700% increase in hate crimes over the past decade), [Muslims, Jews](https://substack.com/redirect/4ef661e8-593b-4d40-bff6-39c256638e59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Latinos (who endured more attacks in [2025](https://substack.com/redirect/d0146b9c-9284-4181-936e-194bc369c278?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than any previous year), or Black Americans (who were historically targeted by a campaign of [racial terror](https://substack.com/redirect/02a1bc06-1170-4a73-aa94-837760220e67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so vast and entrenched that it drove a [mass migration](https://substack.com/redirect/f29a93b9-908d-40d2-9430-30f3b1d6ac88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the North).
Not even conservative areas are immune from right-wing political violence. The only attack more deadly than the 2016 attack on the LGBTQ community in Florida was an attack the following year on a [country music festival](https://substack.com/redirect/528d2a46-a210-42da-ae65-9eb4bfa4249c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Las Vegas, NV.
America has long been defined by political violence. The United States was [born](https://substack.com/redirect/28746fe3-15ee-43be-aa46-767f6d8037ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) through it.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195575316&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NTc1MzE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyNDkyNDAsImV4cCI6MTc3OTg0MTI0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YGYroyNXpkDivRSHJeDwuMy0WlV6JWK93SdwdoSissQ)
### **Double standards**
Somewhat predictably, [heads of state](https://substack.com/redirect/0de5b7c7-6e4e-478a-a973-c2ee870d1c52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from around the world have expressed their condolences in the wake of an attack that appeared to target the president.
Equally predictably--and more understandably--American politicians and journalists have publicly spoken about [fearing](https://substack.com/redirect/cac66bd9-64e5-4318-bd0b-880411a5fe53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for their lives. CNN anchor Wolf Blitzer [said](https://substack.com/redirect/cac66bd9-64e5-4318-bd0b-880411a5fe53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "The first thing that went through my mind: is he trying to shoot me?...[H]e was very, very scary. But I'm OK, now."
Former New Hampshire Gov. Chris Sununu (R) [described](https://substack.com/redirect/213b56e4-0f88-47d0-bd93-f846cc52b511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the attack as "shocking," while Rep. Nanette Barragan (D-CA) [said](https://substack.com/redirect/213b56e4-0f88-47d0-bd93-f846cc52b511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "It's insane...that this is happening at the White House Correspondents' Dinner."
In advance of a planned state visit next week by a man named Charles who people absurdly describe in 2026 as a king, British authorities have been [reviewing](https://substack.com/redirect/4f111385-dccb-4de6-aa37-d7ceeb5bd313?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) security precautions. (At the risk of digression, I must, as a former subject of the British Crown, note that the fact and timing of his visit is [preposterous](https://substack.com/redirect/4d2a0e3f-0e68-4deb-ba3c-7733a4540de1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), given the abject derision heaped upon the U.K. by the president. It's almost as if the only thing greater than the so-called king's hubris is his apparent ignorance and ironic willingness to embrace self-deprecation.)
One wonders where these voices have been over the past three years, while Israel has murdered [hundreds](https://substack.com/redirect/d1f6bfdd-f098-4c84-9c1c-06948bd5fa59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of journalists (as well as any number of healthcare workers, first responders, and their families) in Gaza and Lebanon. Journalists reporting from the front line were among the [first targets](https://substack.com/redirect/a3a0d0ef-6779-496c-b718-8131c3f8eedc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) killed by the Israeli Occupation Force. According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, "Israel's disregard for the lives of journalists--and for the international laws designed to protect them--is [unparalleled](https://substack.com/redirect/d1f6bfdd-f098-4c84-9c1c-06948bd5fa59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
This weekend's cries by news anchors and members of Congress seems, at best, self-serving given their general complicity in the assassinations of so many of their colleagues abroad. Given how many of them have [embraced](https://substack.com/redirect/e22ea38e-6255-4421-bddb-9f4e0a906e8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the international [terrorism](https://substack.com/redirect/5350204f-3f5b-46fa-828d-bd0fbbcc475b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Benjamin Netanyahu, they appear to be hypocrites, even if rightfully concerned for their own safety.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=195575316&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1NTc1MzE2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyNDkyNDAsImV4cCI6MTc3OTg0MTI0MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YGYroyNXpkDivRSHJeDwuMy0WlV6JWK93SdwdoSissQ)
### **Chickens coming home to roost**
The selective outrage by journalists and politicians within the U.S. is not the only double standard to observe. The most glaring one emerges when considering the ostensible target of the attack.
Over the past many decades, there has been no more consistent instigator of political violence in the U.S. than the president himself. His [pattern](https://substack.com/redirect/2b692b85-905a-4d7e-8a14-5eefa84f3c40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of inviting violence upon his political enemies has been well-documented.
In the wake of the murder of Charlie Kirk (to which I'll return in a moment), CNN [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/2b692b85-905a-4d7e-8a14-5eefa84f3c40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that:
> Trump and his allies are cherry-picking evidence and misleading about recent violent episodes. They're also casting stones from a glass house when it comes to the potential role of political rhetoric in such tragedies.
> In fact, Trump has spent the last decade saying conspicuously violent things and often flirting with the prospect of justified violence by his supporters....
> In June, two [Democratic Minnesota state lawmakers](https://substack.com/redirect/1f29e1b8-f819-4b82-8782-8d12c907dfef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were shot, one of whom died. In April, there was [an arson attempt](https://substack.com/redirect/dedffb06-ff3b-49b3-a970-eca1fdc324ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the home of Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro, another Democrat. And in December 2022 and January 2023, a former Republican candidate paid people to [shoot up the homes of Democratic officials](https://substack.com/redirect/6fd65b44-9f80-4a4d-b85c-0b9ec6ed1031?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in New Mexico. Also in 2022, Nancy Pelosi's husband, [Paul Pelosi](https://substack.com/redirect/da50ef0e-0e31-4082-ac8f-6ffd7f4edb46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), was the victim of a brutal hammer attack by a man who said he'd been looking for the then-speaker. There was also the plot to [kidnap Democratic Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer](https://substack.com/redirect/d08686cc-e2f5-4247-811a-2de9f1268031?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2020.
> And perhaps most notably, some Trump supporters rose up in violence to try and overturn the 2020 election results on January 6, 2021.
> All these incidents happened in the last five years.
According to NBC, "nearly two dozen elected officials on both sides of the aisle said they were [targeted](https://substack.com/redirect/1e594db2-b887-4533-84e2-5bcb3f2b57cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after getting caught in the president's crosshairs" over the course of just a few weeks last year.
These examples don't even include the president's frequent [invitations](https://substack.com/redirect/9b16741d-54ca-484e-8f3f-8c5c233cc931?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to violence targeting racial & ethnic minorities, as well as grassroots critics of his corruption and belligerence.
In 2016, the president launched his first campaign for the White House by [falsely](https://substack.com/redirect/13136815-0ae2-4c2d-88e4-7167e26206de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claiming that undocumented immigrants from Mexico "are bringing crime. They're rapists." Setting aside the many ways in which elected Democrats absurdly [empowered and enabled](https://substack.com/redirect/1c520f5f-cc53-42e3-bf08-aea87193014c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) him, his rhetoric led to a dramatic increase in anti-Latino hate crimes--precisely the kind of political violence that he now claims to fear.
[According](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1b0256-a77f-4b14-bb9d-7f4f83d9924a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Miami Herald:
> Since Trump made his famous 2016 campaign claim about Mexican migrants, violent attacks against Latino immigrants [have risen sharply](https://substack.com/redirect/7871dcc8-a213-4f94-baf5-fa3170743714?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), according to the Center for the Study of Hate and Extremism at California State University. The [2019 mass shooting at a Walmart shopping center in El Paso](https://substack.com/redirect/d8db06b4-383f-4de9-bebb-12ea58644014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that left 23 people dead and more than two dozen wounded was the worst attack against Hispanics in America's recent history. Echoing Trump's rhetoric, the gunman had posted an online message shortly before the massacre saying that the shooting was "in response to the Hispanic invasion of Texas."
Who is mourning those victims of political violence?

### **Was that even real?**
Unlike any of the many examples of political violence mentioned above, it's not even entirely clear that the attack on last night's dinner was, in fact, what it appeared to be. Like previous attempts on the president's life, there are many unanswered questions and reasons to question the official narrative.
First, Trump's reaction to the attack suggests it was a false flag. Who else, in the wake of an assassination attempt, has appeared [smiling](https://substack.com/redirect/bf4701c0-f811-4595-9129-f2735353b0a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at a press conference? Analyses of the president's seemingly relaxed [reaction](https://substack.com/redirect/611776b4-a62e-49d0-9ec8-d8dc05bdbd92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the supposed attack also suggest that he somehow saw it coming. Finally, reporting from the correspondents dinner in its immediate wake, Fox News reporter Aishah Hasine seemed to indicate that the president may have [warned](https://substack.com/redirect/76b5c883-88e1-4ba0-b019-ceaa5be067d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her about the attack _before_ it happened, before her audio feed on the live broadcast mysteriously (and conveniently) went silent.
Moreover, the president's first comments after the attack opportunistically used it as a [pretext](https://substack.com/redirect/7d335f95-3e0b-4804-ab9b-121aa1a15b1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to promote his pet project, a monument to his renowned ego in the form of a White House ballroom on which he began construction [illegally](https://substack.com/redirect/17c931c4-8939-404e-990f-4ab7dc48aa2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and despite legitimate public opposition.
"We need the ballroom," he [said](https://substack.com/redirect/f5b9519b-e0f0-4bbe-8190-e6a5516f2c97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), before discussing its security features, including "drone-proof" bulletproof glass. Within a few hours, he posted to social media claiming that the attack "would never have happened with the Militarily Top Secret Ballroom currently under construction at the White House....It cannot be built fast enough!"
This might not even be the first time Trump has politically benefited from a staged assassination attempt. Just two weeks ago, The New Republic reported that, "As Donald Trump's MAGA base sours on him, some of them now think the 2024 assassination attempt on him in Butler, Pennsylvania, [was staged](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa5bb97-1709-4a6a-83dd-2903eeaeecf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Trisha Hope, a Texas delegate to the 2024 Republican Convention, [noted](https://substack.com/redirect/c5d696b7-1230-40a7-b8aa-66f284baaf89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that:
> Following the inauguration, I found it odd that Trump wasn't going aggressively after those who allowed this to happen. He seemed to behave like it was no big deal....
> Since the attempt on his life, Trump has show[n] no interest in investigating what really happened. He never mentions it, it's as if it never happened, except when he tells us, he took a bullet for us.
That's not the only seemingly staged assassination attempt. After Charlie Kirk was killed [last September](https://substack.com/redirect/b791bd71-ea34-446f-beb4-41b628315970?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), any number of writers observed vast [discrepancies](https://substack.com/redirect/33cc6ad9-82f9-4b92-9125-79b7a6c7f2df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) between the official narrative and what appeared to take place. "Respectable" news outlets decried their observations as conspiracy theories, but the very same outlets have a long (and disturbingly consistent) [record](https://substack.com/redirect/be903f8e-feef-4c31-b111-929300e2da3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of publishing lies promoted by the Pentagon and other official sources.
I don't claim to have inside information, or to know the facts about what happened last night. But I do know that the facts reported as "news" often fail to add up.
As long as we're on the subject of Charlie Kirk, I'll close by reflecting on what voices across the Left and Right have agreed upon: he had voiced [concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/c322ac5e-d4a5-4bc8-ada1-4aa5292e346c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the weeks before his murder about fearing Netanyahu:
> In the weeks leading up to his September 10 assassination, Kirk had come to loathe the Israeli leader, regarding him as a "bully," the source said. Kirk was disgusted by what he witnessed inside the Trump administration, where Netanyahu sought to personally dictate the president's personnel decisions, and weaponized Israeli assets like billionaire donor Miriam Adelson to keep the White House firmly under its thumb.
> According to Kirk's friend, who also enjoyed access to President Donald Trump and his inner circle, Kirk strongly warned Trump last June against bombing Iran on Israel's behalf. "Charlie was the only person who did that," they said, recalling how Trump "barked at him" in response and angrily shut down the conversation. The source believes the incident confirmed in Kirk's mind that the president of the United States had fallen under the control of a malign foreign power, and was leading his own country into a series of disastrous conflicts.
> By the following month, Kirk had become the target of a sustained private campaign of intimidation and free-floating fury by wealthy and powerful allies of Netanyahu - figures he described in an interview as Jewish "leaders" and "stakeholders."
> "He was afraid of them," the source emphasized.
This passage is especially chilling to read today, not only because it reflects on Kirk's fear of a figure well-known for active international terrorism, but also because it observes the reasons why his fear emerged: arguing against an American attack on Iran a year ago.
Given how Kirk's concerns were ultimately ignored, and the mounting [damage](https://substack.com/redirect/e2c38208-36bc-4af0-b5fa-f1cd7e48822a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the international economy in the time since the [axis of evil](https://substack.com/redirect/482f7429-fb55-44e9-821e-37f65ab6a68c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) launched its attack on Tehran last month, it behooves us all to examine these narratives until one grounded in actual facts comes to be more widely established.
Given Washington's [history](https://substack.com/redirect/7fed0f1f-7ff0-4d08-bbe7-057399bd6522?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of using false flag attacks as cover for its repeated international [aggression](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff0da08-3224-4a82-8d7c-e35e1e3ba599?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I have little faith that even that will lead to accountability. But it will at least make accountability possible, however long overdue.

This is America Political violence is the antithesis of democracy. It reflects the erosion of debate and reason by force. It is also quintessentially American. In that context, political violence appears more on brand than an aberration. There is an entire federal agency dedicated to : ICE, which Congress just last year to become the nation's most well-funded armed domestic agency. And that's just within the U.S. Our country's role in the world has been defined by political violence for nearly a century. The only attack more deadly than the 2016 attack on the LGBTQ community in Florida was an attack the following year on a in Las Vegas, NV. America has long been defined by political violence. Within a few hours, he posted to social media claiming that the attack "would never have happened with the Militarily Top Secret Ballroom currently under construction at the White House....It cannot be built fast enough!" This might not even be the first time Trump has politically benefited from a staged assassination attempt. Just two weeks ago, The New Republic reported that, "As Donald Trump's MAGA base sours on him, some of them now think the 2024 assassination attempt on him in Butler, Pennsylvania, ." Trisha Hope, a Texas delegate to the 2024 Republican Convention, that: Following the inauguration, I found it odd that Trump wasn't going aggressively after those who allowed this to happen. He seemed to behave like it was no big deal.... Since the attempt on his life, Trump has show[n] no interest in investigating what really happened. He never mentions it, it's as if it never happened, except when he tells us, he took a bullet for us. That's not the only seemingly staged assassination attempt. After Charlie Kirk was killed , any number of writers observed vast between the official narrative and what appeared to take place. "Respectable" news outlets decried their observations as conspiracy theories, but the very same outlets have a long (and disturbingly consistent) of publishing lies promoted by the Pentagon and other official sources. I don't claim to have inside information, or to know the facts about what happened last night. But I do know that the facts reported as "news" often fail to add up. As long as we're on the subject of Charlie Kirk, I'll close by reflecting on what voices across the Left and Right have agreed upon: he had voiced in the weeks before his murder about fearing Netanyahu: In the weeks leading up to his September 10 assassination, Kirk had come to loathe the Israeli leader, regarding him as a "bully," the source said. Kirk was disgusted by what he witnessed inside the Trump administration, where Netanyahu sought to personally dictate the president's personnel decisions, and weaponized Israeli assets like billionaire donor Miriam Adelson to keep the White House firmly under its thumb. According to Kirk's friend, who also enjoyed access to President Donald Trump and his inner circle, Kirk strongly warned Trump last June against bombing Iran on Israel's behalf. "Charlie was the only person who did that," they said, recalling how Trump "barked at him" in response and angrily shut down the conversation. The source believes the incident confirmed in Kirk's mind that the president of the United States had fallen under the control of a malign foreign power, and was leading his own country into a series of disastrous conflicts. By the following month, Kirk had become the target of a sustained private campaign of intimidation and free-floating fury by wealthy and powerful allies of Netanyahu - figures he described in an interview as Jewish "leaders" and "stakeholders." "He was afraid of them," the source emphasized. This passage is especially chilling to read today, not only because it reflects on Kirk's fear of a figure well-known for active international terrorism, but also because it observes the reasons why his fear emerged: arguing against an American attack on Iran a year ago. Given how Kirk's concerns were ultimately ignored, and the mounting to the international economy in the time since the launched its attack on Tehran last month, it behooves us all to examine these narratives until one grounded in actual facts comes to be more widely established. Given Washington's of using false flag attacks as cover for its repeated international , I have little faith that even that will lead to accountability. But it will at least make accountability possible, however long overdue. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Shahid Buttar South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 ? ?

name: Beth Farnham for Congress
subject: Tea for Me AND Thee!
body:
District Round-up 04.26.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you...
---
|
---
| | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com) | [Read on blog](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F04%2F26%2Ftea-for-me-and-thee%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=d171b20820adb118270a369947ab52b7&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F7187&sr=0&signature=66c7cb4fc076bfdac4588ec34ca429aa&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
---|---|---
# [Tea for Me AND Thee!](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/04/26/tea-for-me-and-thee/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on April 26, 2026
---
| **District Round-up 04.26.26**
---
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=bbe66cf02c3e9be1936c4f0d19ff71a1ccf1f03914006e4bcc5fa56d5758ed8d&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5d1d638cffe6513acaeb0680070c2660&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8)**
---
| **Tea with Blair County Federation of Democratic Women**
---
Many thanks to the Blair County Federation of Democratic Women for inviting me to speak at their tea today.
---
I appreciated the engaged audience and their excellent questions. Oh, and the delicious food too. Hummingbird cake for the win!
---
It was equally great to hear from fellow candidates Sarah Holland and Caleb McCoy.
---
We addressed many issues affecting women like unequal wages, threatened voting rights, the lack of quality childcare, and inadequate healthcare, as well as their solutions.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e0881a3c83d88bf95269701592037d06ee8237b4684bf1f3fd63a66af5daafc2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7d98859fc6df0341e7fb1116e1a085c8&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) !
---
(Photo credit: Eileen Roberts)
---
| |
---
| | **Endorsement Alert!**
---
Many thanks to the [United Mine Workers of America](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=63e49297d084e6c22c91001bb1afb8ade6a5558a37fe3e8ea65eed02f5b5d50d&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d7949c90b84ec780107e735cecfb826a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) for their unanimous endorsement of my campaign!
---
The [United Mine Workers of America](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=63e49297d084e6c22c91001bb1afb8ade6a5558a37fe3e8ea65eed02f5b5d50d&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d7949c90b84ec780107e735cecfb826a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) have a proud history of defending the rights of workers against the ultra-wealthy capitalists and right here in our 13th Congressional District!
---
Their organization is a manifestation of our First Amendment rights and I will continue their fight to unionize workers and protect coal communities when elected as Representative in Congress.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ea30de5487cbbe81eb4f3e77bd3d61abdc23ee9fd848cc1ecea4c0853e6fdbfc&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1b68107b3408f03cbf9bfdf8341822ce&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| **Representative Joyce is NOT a Steward of the Earth!**
---
How is our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, mocking Earth Day and working to destroy our children’s health?
---
By sponsoring the Red Tape Act! (You can find this in my Legislative Comparison further down in my newsletter)
---
While former patients have confided to me his awful bedside manner, this sorry excuse of a dermatologist is breaking his Hippocratic oath to do all the harm he possibly can by trying to bypass a necessary review of the Environmental Protection Agency as normally required by the Clean Air Act for new projects.
---
It is absolutely outrageous that this person who claims to care about people’s health is so willing to forgo it to advance Trump’s agenda of incompetence and cruelty.
---
Perhaps like any ultra wealthy capitalist whose net worth numbers millions of dollars, he’s imagining the revenue he’ll generate if more people acquire skin cancer and other adverse conditions as companies release more toxins into the air. Whatever, he’s thinking of, it’s not the health of future generations.
---
But it doesn’t have to be this way.
---
You can vote me into Congress instead.
---
Please vote for me in the May 19th Primary Election so that I can properly represent the people across the 10+ counties of our stunningly beautiful district. If you are a registered Democrat, I will be on your ballot to vote for. If you are a registered Republican, I encourage you to write my name in and fill in the corresponding oval instead of voting for multimillionaire John Joyce.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=9ca8a38b752e8b9fb8999c8b64e65b217c2ad9f60ce3abf96d8a6a3f7cfc7492&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f75f4c2d01fe75249b6e2ae3d145e87e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) and our health!
---
| |
---
| **Women’s Democratic Club of Franklin County**
---
Many thanks to the Women’s Democratic Club of Franklin County for inviting me to speak to them on Thursday evening. Their group is doing much in the community to support candidates for change.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=62a69a2b4d5c3581b11a0a93054f777cc9c922bf69211c4ba9ca12d0e04ace9d&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b951046d315e7c4f69174738bd78b588&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) !
---
Below is the speech that I gave to their group.
---
| Thank you Women’s Democratic Club of Franklin County for inviting me to speak at your meeting.
---
We are gathered today because women continue to fight for equality.
---
At a time when women are more than half the population, we are still wildly underrepresented in government.
---
In the U.S. House of Representatives, 128 women occupy 29% of the seats.
---
In the U.S. Senate, 26 women occupy 26% of the seats.
---
In the Pennsylvania State Assembly, women hold 32% of the seats, including Madame Speaker, Joanna McClinton.
---
In the Pennsylvania State Senate, women hold 32.4% of the seats.
---
Of course, we’ve never had a woman President, nor in the state of Pennsylvania a woman governor.
---
In Pennsylvania, women earn 81 cents to every dollar, in our 13th Congressional District about 70 cents to every dollar made by a man, and In Franklin County, the median income for all workers aged 15 years and older, regardless of work hours, was $49,795 for males and $31,669 for females. However, when specifically considering full-time, year-round workers within the same age group, the median income was $64,401 for males and $50,604 for females.
---
There is much work to be done and I am proud to be a part of that fight.
---
If I could make Reproductive Freedom my number one priority, I would, but if we don’t have Democracy, then we don’t have Reproductive Freedom either.
---
And so my slogan is Choose Democracy, but the pink capital is my logo because I will never forsake our causes.
---
We deserve not only equal representation, but equal voting rights and agency over our own bodies.
---
It is never anyone’s business, especially that of a legislator, to come between a woman and the health decisions she makes with her trusted medical professionals, just like it is never the business of anyone else to come between a man and the health decisions he makes with trusted medical professionals.
---
And let’s be very clear – the Save America Act that our own U.S. Representative, wealthy white male John Joyce voted for, is not a sincere attempt to prevent the minimal amount of voter fraud that occurs, but a real stab at suppressing the votes of those whose names don’t match those on their birth certificates – primarily married women.
---
In the wealthy white men’s world, women can’t possibly have it all, they have decided to relegate women to islands of domesticity instead.
---
But women know differently.
---
We know because we are equally human, equally reasoning, equally emotionally intelligent, equally able to manage working adults, equally able to write persuasive letters to the editor, books, speeches, social media posts, equally able to drive heavy equipment, create a pivot table on a spreadsheet, cover a breaking news story, sell a piece of property, contract a lucrative business deal, start a business, paint a portrait, reveal the image of DNA, and every other human endeavor that humans undertake. And how could we not be when the overwhelming majority of us are built as bearers of the human race to begin with?
---
I would assert that we are superior in the knowledge of our own bodies.
---
But that is not a position I covet –
---
I want everyone to know about all of our bodies, through evidenced-based science that is also LGBTQ+-inclusive and taught by qualified instructors.
---
I say these things because in our 13th Congressional District, crisis pregnancy centers, which are not regulated healthcare facilities, often worm their way into schools, teaching their purity-based philosophy of abstinence and victim-blaming, rooted in misogyny.
---
It’s one of the reasons I’m fighting for National Standards of Sexuality Education.
---
And so I pledge to you, as our elected representative to
---
* Enshrine into federal law Reproductive Freedom including, but not limited to: abortion, gender-affirming care, birth control, and IVF.
* Ensure publication of the ratified 28th (Equal Rights) Amendment to the US Constitution that reads, “Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of sex.”
* Enshrine into federal law national sex education standards.
* Require clear labeling of crisis pregnancy centers (CPC’s) that are not regulated healthcare facilities.

I will do more than these things when voted into office, but I will always have us – our equality, our agency, in mind.
---
And I invite you to join me in this fight for equality by spreading the messages of my campaign – through my literature, bracelets, and bumper stickers that are on the table. Let’s help voters know my name and what I stand for because we don’t vote for the issues we care most about on the ballots, we vote for people.
---
So please vote for me in the primary and remember, when you choose Beth Farnham, you not only choose Reproductive Freedom, you Choose Democracy.
---
| **SEQUESTRATION**
---
This is just your friendly reminder that before Trump began the war in Iran, the federal deficit was already slated to rise so much, it will trigger sequestration.
---
Sequestration means a mandated extra 2% cut to Medicare payments estimated to be about $415 billion by the Congressional Budget Office and $500 billion by Kaiser Family Foundation. Patients will need to find the money somewhere else.
---
All of this has been in order to put more wealth into the pockets of the ultra-wealthy.
---
I went over this information in my slide deck on the One Big Beautiful Bill Act last year (July 2025) which you can watch on the embedded YouTube video below.
---
Of course, we don’t have to remain in this nightmare scenario.
---
You can wake up and vote for this Democrat, Beth Farnham, to assume office because I’ll actually look out for Everyday Americans instead of the stinking rich.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=524e7976beba80c3966a299f58d03040d426f3edda43a7e1fe325e6535fd0922&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b5464e43bdf8fca54c2ac104b2b7874a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) !
---
[https://www.cbo.gov/system/files/2025-08/61659-SPAYGO.pdf](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=696705c68901f37f7eb1bafd50eeccca7f6324fc33d9f8bc5d93e002549ec30a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=ed6119acd6d9a8578bd86e55f9724dbb&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JvLmdvdi9zeXN0ZW0vZmlsZXMvMjAyNS0wOC82MTY1OS1TUEFZR08ucGRm&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8)
[https://www.youtube.com/live/A3pgOevJTkI](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ff68b715dbd87183ebab5104b331433a967928e9e13b5c6e7f0bb4b46c112c11&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6346dfe41b79e97b1a8d2e6f88c01c50&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9BM3BnT2V2SlRrSQ=&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8)
| **MAYFEST 2026**
---
Many thanks to Team Beth Farnham for Congress Member Janis Jones and Volunteer Diane Buza for working with me today at Huntingdon’s annual Mayfest Festival.
---
It was a rainy day, but the voters brought the sunshine with their pledges to vote for me. Many of them are registered under different political parties, but no matter how they are registered, I plan to work for them, not some narcissistic billionaire.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=47d5f0aa6ff9c751cbf1c9e349913c083ddf99a87ad2b1909a68aa9858d737b1&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=55a4cd381fe8dd07f2394e4d792d584b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8) !
---
(Photo credits: Janis Jones)
---
| | |
---|---|---
| **Charity of the Week!**
---
Please support Huntingdon County United Way, if you can.
---
Their new “Care Closet” provides “personal care and hygiene items to families and individuals in need across Huntingdon County.”
---
This is because “45% of households in Huntingdon County struggle to afford basic needs. Of the county’s 16,038 households:
---
* 1,851 live in poverty.
* 5,306 fall into the ALICE category: working individuals and families who cannot meet the cost of living.”

You can find out more at this link: [https://www.huntingdonuw.org/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fd355e0742899882a4b987ed37abc1522ac8d7b7f6690f1d2f706c10bb67cb34&blog_id=213069660&post_id=7187&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f3f01ab210a84b361e816c476bed5f96&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaHVudGluZ2RvbnV3Lm9yZy8&email_id=fdaa229287dd79fa0f71fcc66f071fb8)
---
| |
---
| **Comparing and Contrasting Votes on Legislation**
---
Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison, and why!
---
---
---
| | If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth
---
| [Like](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F04%2F26%2Ftea-for-me-and-thee%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup%26like_actor%3D248418217%26like_hmac%3D54409d79a2d60c101e55ce8c2c1efde4%26postid%3D7187%26like%3D1%26source%3Dsub_email&sr=0&signature=69eefcad9222e16f706240f63485de0c&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
---
---
| | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2026. [Unsubscribe](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fsubscribe.wordpress.com%2F%3Fkey%3D2da6e9260bd1a2cbd96fb759984ff6b5%26email%3Ddpwillis67%2540gmail.com%26b%3D14hEvW8gXgCOv7J_Yb9Hb-DDQlaOdrMOsuTPm3G66v6k2Uu2jPHo29RQqh_JyVrdKykJDSeRHheBfsz7Acdia-0F7SflNRGs-agXtMSbWywem9nbR3_jIKz7LCLPKvUVD2_zX9ZtPp33I8rBLiN2GEGArGMSHdIaaQ%253D%253D%26oneclickunsubscribe%3Dtrue&sr=0&signature=9665de0d9e47312bf5751c27879b6727&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [manage your email subscriptions](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fsubscriptions&sr=0&signature=9a93d58132588a844257d92f8f9fa0b1&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z).

Their group is doing much in the community to support candidates for change. Together, we ! Below is the speech that I gave to their group. | Thank you Women’s Democratic Club of Franklin County for inviting me to speak at your meeting. We are gathered today because women continue to fight for equality. At a time when women are more than half the population, we are still wildly underrepresented in government. In the U.S. House of Representatives, 128 women occupy 29% of the seats. In the U.S. Senate, 26 women occupy 26% of the seats. In the Pennsylvania State Assembly, women hold 32% of the seats, including Madame Speaker, Joanna McClinton. In the Pennsylvania State Senate, women hold 32.4% of the seats. Of course, we’ve never had a woman President, nor in the state of Pennsylvania a woman governor. In Pennsylvania, women earn 81 cents to every dollar, in our 13th Congressional District about 70 cents to every dollar made by a man, and In Franklin County, the median income for all workers aged 15 years and older, regardless of work hours, was $49,795 for males and $31,669 for females. However, when specifically considering full-time, year-round workers within the same age group, the median income was $64,401 for males and $50,604 for females. There is much work to be done and I am proud to be a part of that fight. If I could make Reproductive Freedom my number one priority, I would, but if we don’t have Democracy, then we don’t have Reproductive Freedom either. And so my slogan is Choose Democracy, but the pink capital is my logo because I will never forsake our causes. We deserve not only equal representation, but equal voting rights and agency over our own bodies. It is never anyone’s business, especially that of a legislator, to come between a woman and the health decisions she makes with her trusted medical professionals, just like it is never the business of anyone else to come between a man and the health decisions he makes with trusted medical professionals. And let’s be very clear – the Save America Act that our own U.S. Representative, wealthy white male John Joyce voted for, is not a sincere attempt to prevent the minimal amount of voter fraud that occurs, but a real stab at suppressing the votes of those whose names don’t match those on their birth certificates – primarily married women. In the wealthy white men’s world, women can’t possibly have it all, they have decided to relegate women to islands of domesticity instead. But women know differently. We know because we are equally human, equally reasoning, equally emotionally intelligent, equally able to manage working adults, equally able to write persuasive letters to the editor, books, speeches, social media posts, equally able to drive heavy equipment, create a pivot table on a spreadsheet, cover a breaking news story, sell a piece of property, contract a lucrative business deal, start a business, paint a portrait, reveal the image of DNA, and every other human endeavor that humans undertake. And how could we not be when the overwhelming majority of us are built as bearers of the human race to begin with? I would assert that we are superior in the knowledge of our own bodies. But that is not a position I covet – I want everyone to know about all of our bodies, through evidenced-based science that is also LGBTQ+-inclusive and taught by qualified instructors. I say these things because in our 13th Congressional District, crisis pregnancy centers, which are not regulated healthcare facilities, often worm their way into schools, teaching their purity-based philosophy of abstinence and victim-blaming, rooted in misogyny. It’s one of the reasons I’m fighting for National Standards of Sexuality Education. And so I pledge to you, as our elected representative to Enshrine into federal law Reproductive Freedom including, but not limited to: abortion, gender-affirming care, birth control, and IVF. Ensure publication of the ratified 28th (Equal Rights) Amendment to the US Constitution that reads, “Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of sex.” Enshrine into federal law national sex education standards. Require clear labeling of crisis pregnancy centers (CPC’s) that are not regulated healthcare facilities. I will do more than these things when voted into office, but I will always have us – our equality, our agency, in mind. And I invite you to join me in this fight for equality by spreading the messages of my campaign – through my literature, bracelets, and bumper stickers that are on the table. Let’s help voters know my name and what I stand for because we don’t vote for the issues we care most about on the ballots, we vote for people. So please vote for me in the primary and remember, when you choose Beth Farnham, you not only choose Reproductive Freedom, you Choose Democracy. | SEQUESTRATION This is just your friendly reminder that before Trump began the war in Iran, the federal deficit was already slated to rise so much, it will trigger sequestration. Sequestration means a mandated extra 2% cut to Medicare payments estimated to be about $415 billion by the Congressional Budget Office and $500 billion by Kaiser Family Foundation. Patients will need to find the money somewhere else. All of this has been in order to put more wealth into the pockets of the ultra-wealthy. I went over this information in my slide deck on the One Big Beautiful Bill Act last year (July 2025) which you can watch on the embedded YouTube video below. Of course, we don’t have to remain in this nightmare scenario. You can wake up and vote for this Democrat, Beth Farnham, to assume office because I’ll actually look out for Everyday Americans instead of the stinking rich. Together, we ! | MAYFEST 2026 Many thanks to Team Beth Farnham for Congress Member Janis Jones and Volunteer Diane Buza for working with me today at Huntingdon’s annual Mayfest Festival. It was a rainy day, but the voters brought the sunshine with their pledges to vote for me. Many of them are registered under different political parties, but no matter how they are registered, I plan to work for them, not some narcissistic billionaire. Together, we ! (Photo credits: Janis Jones) | | | ---|---|--- | Charity of the Week! Please support Huntingdon County United Way, if you can. Their new “Care Closet” provides “personal care and hygiene items to families and individuals in need across Huntingdon County.” This is because “45% of households in Huntingdon County struggle to afford basic needs. Of the county’s 16,038 households: 1,851 live in poverty. 5,306 fall into the ALICE category: working individuals and families who cannot meet the cost of living.” You can find out more at this link: | | | Comparing and Contrasting Votes on Legislation Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison, and why! | | If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2026. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real-time notifications – all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
Gas is almost $6 a gallon in San Diego. National prices are well over $4 — up from $2.98 the day before Trump started his reckless war of choice in Iran.
And all that money is going right into the pockets of Big Oil. In fact, in the first month of this war, the world’s top 100 oil and gas companies made more than $30 MILLION AN HOUR in profit.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
Does Donald Trump care that gas prices are high? Of course not — he wants Big Oil to rake in even more profits as part of their back-door agreement (remember when he asked Big Oil megadonors to throw $1 billion into his re-election campaign?).
Far beyond not caring, he’s even lying about when we can expect some relief, according to his own Secretary of Energy:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
This administration is stunningly reckless with the lives and livelihoods of the American people.
This November, we have the chance to send a message and make a change. We can reject the Trump administration’s extremism and make it clear that families all across this country do not support their cruel, divisive, and expensive agenda.
I’m all in on this fight. My team is on the ground working hard to prep for my own re-election in CA-51, to support my Democratic House colleagues who are in tough re-election fights, and to boost up strong Democratic challengers who are working to flip red seats.
Will you join me by contributing $10 or $25 today? What we raise from emails like this one has a huge impact on the work we’re able to do — and no amount is too small to make a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
